# Project Guidelines

## Code Style
- Use Next.js App Router with React 19 and Tailwind CSS
- Follow standard React patterns with client components for interactivity
- Use `@/` alias for imports (configured in jsconfig.json)

## Architecture
- Skill exchange platform with authentication via NextAuth (credentials provider)
- Mock in-memory API for skills (replace with database later)
- Components: Navbar, Footer, session-based routing

## Build and Test
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run start` - Start production server

## Conventions
- API routes in `app/api/` with auth checks
- Client components marked with "use client"
- Forms use controlled components with state management</content>
